title: Archie's USM
description: A grounded and performant Vanilla-Plus-style modpack aimed at enhancing the base Minecraft experience
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836993f7088a46a1e3392679d25b5f4b0f3101a7.png) --- Archie's USM (Ultimate Survival Minecraft) is a Vanilla-Plus-style modpack aimed at enhancing Minecraft's core gameplay loop with a variety of optimized and high-quality mods/resource packs. It features some seriously immersion-enhancing (and finely-tuned) mods like [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered), [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model), and the [Physics Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod) along with other mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast), and [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) to improve/maintain performance. The modpack is also multiplayer-ready with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) and [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) embedded. > ℹ️ **Note:** If you want the pro version of the [Physics Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod), checkout [Haubna](https://www.patreon.com/Haubna) on Patreon. It's available for free! Just look for the newest download link 🙂
![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e949acb9c9e952c9f6211309ce296ee59b393547.png) --- * **Artwork:**
Loading screen artwork by [Mariana Salimena](https://www.artstation.com/marianasalimena) on ArtStation.
